SEARCH
Package sc.fiji.snt.viewer.geditor

Class SNTGraphAdapter<V,E extends org.jgrapht.graph.DefaultWeightedEdge>

java.lang.Object
com.mxgraph.util.mxEventSource
com.mxgraph.view.mxGraph
org.jgrapht.ext.JGraphXAdapter<V,E>
sc.fiji.snt.viewer.geditor.SNTGraphAdapter<V,E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.jgrapht.event.GraphListener<V,E>, org.jgrapht.event.VertexSetListener<V>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AnnotationGraphAdapter, SNTPseudographAdapter, TreeGraphAdapter
public class SNTGraphAdapter<V,E extends org.jgrapht.graph.DefaultWeightedEdge> extends org.jgrapht.ext.JGraphXAdapter<V,E>
Base adapter that converts SNT graphs to JGraphX graph models for visualization. Handles vertex and edge styling, color management, and editing constraints for SNT graph displays.
